name: Sauteed Turkey with Tequlia Cream Sauce
recipeIngredient: 5 1/2 Pounds turkey cutlets, cut into 1/2-inch strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 2 tablespoons oil in a heavy large skillet over high heat.
2. Season turkey strips with salt and pepper.
3. Add the turkey strips to the skillet and sauté until brown but still pink inside, about 1 minute per side. Using a slotted spoon, transfer the turkey strips to a platter.
4. Heat the remaining 2 tablespoons oil in the same skillet.
5. Add shallots and mushrooms to the skillet and sauté until brown, about 3 minutes.
6. Add tequila to the skillet and bring to a boil. Reduce the heat to allow the tequila to reduce by half.
7. Add chicken stock to the skillet and bring to a boil. Reduce the heat to allow the chicken stock to reduce by half.
8. Add crème fraîche to the skillet and simmer until the sauce reaches the desired consistency.
9. Return the turkey strips to the sauce. Stir in salt, white pepper, and Tabasco sauce.
10. Spoon the turkey and sauce over Spaetzle.
11. Sprinkle with chopped epazote leaves.
Yield: 6 servings
